title: Rice blast (Magnaporthe oryzae) — integrated management stack
body: Rice blast is the single highest-impact disease on the global rice crop; IRRI estimates ~30% of global production losses trace to it. Integrated management combines four layers. (1) Host resistance is the most practical and cost-efficient control; over 100 R-genes are known, but single-gene varieties collapse under virulent races, so rotate resistance sources across seasons. (2) Fungicide rotation: the ICAR-verified spray stack for field protection is Prochloraz 23.5% + Tricyclazole 20% SE at 2 ml/L (65% disease reduction, 6,026 kg/ha grain) or Tricyclazole 75% WP at 0.6 g/L (52% reduction); copper oxychloride 0.25% or copper hydroxide 0.25% add a second line. (3) Biocontrol: Pseudomonas fluorescens gives measurable disease reduction with a yield bump. (4) Botanicals: 3% garlic-bulb extract and 3% neem oil are the best-performing organic sprays. Practical rule for Sri Lankan tank-fed fields: pair a resistant variety (from the RRDI recommended list) with a Tricyclazole spray at boot stage, and rotate to copper hydroxide if panicle-stage neck blast starts appearing.

body_translated.en: Rice blast is the single highest-impact disease on the global rice crop; IRRI estimates ~30% of global production losses trace to it. Integrated management combines four layers. (1) Host resistance is the most practical and cost-efficient control; over 100 R-genes are known, but single-gene varieties collapse under virulent races, so rotate resistance sources across seasons. (2) Fungicide rotation: the ICAR-verified spray stack for field protection is Prochloraz 23.5% + Tricyclazole 20% SE at 2 ml/L (65% disease reduction, 6,026 kg/ha grain) or Tricyclazole 75% WP at 0.6 g/L (52% reduction); copper oxychloride 0.25% or copper hydroxide 0.25% add a second line. (3) Biocontrol: Pseudomonas fluorescens gives measurable disease reduction with a yield bump. (4) Botanicals: 3% garlic-bulb extract and 3% neem oil are the best-performing organic sprays. Practical rule for Sri Lankan tank-fed fields: pair a resistant variety (from the RRDI recommended list) with a Tricyclazole spray at boot stage, and rotate to copper hydroxide if panicle-stage neck blast starts appearing.
body_translated.si: වී බ්ලාස්ට් ගෝලීය වී බෝගයේ විශාලතම බලපෑම් ඇති රෝගයයි; IRRI ඇස්තමේන්තු කරයි ගෝලීය නිෂ්පාදන පාඩුවලින් 30% ක්ම මෙයට සම්බන්ධය. ඒකාබද්ධ කළමනාකරණය ස්ථර හතරක් ඒකාබද්ධ කරයි. (1) ධාරක ප්‍රතිරෝධය වඩාත්ම ප්‍රායෝගික සහ වියදම් ඵලදායී පාලනයයි; R-ජීන 100 කට වඩා දන්නා නමුත්, තනි-ජීන ප්‍රභේද දරුණු වර්ග යටතේ කඩා වැටේ, එබැවින් වාර අතරින් ප්‍රතිරෝධක ප්‍රභවයන් මාරු කරන්න. (2) දිලීර නාශක මාරුව: ICAR-වරණය කළ ක්ෂේත්‍ර ආරක්ෂණ පුපුරන්ත ස්ථරය වන්නේ Prochloraz 23.5% + Tricyclazole 20% SE 2 ml/L (65% රෝග අඩුවීම, 6,026 kg/ha ධාන්‍ය) හෝ Tricyclazole 75% WP 0.6 g/L (52% අඩුවීම); copper oxychloride 0.25% හෝ copper hydroxide 0.25% දෙවන පෙළක් එක් කරයි. (3) ජෛව පාලනය: Pseudomonas fluorescens මැනිය හැකි රෝග අඩුවීමක් සහ අස්වැන්න වැඩිවීමක් ලබා දෙයි. (4) ශාක පදනම් කරගත්: 3% සුදුළූණු බල්බ් සාරය සහ 3% නීම් තෙල් හොඳම කාබනික ඉසීම් වේ. ශ්‍රී ලාංකික ජලාශ පෝෂිත ක්ෂේත්‍ර සඳහා ප්‍රායෝගික රීතිය: ප්‍රතිරෝධී ප්‍රභේදයක් (RRDI නිර්දේශිත ලැයිස්තුවෙන්) boot අදියරේදී Tricyclazole ඉසීමක් සමඟ යුගල කරන්න, සහ panicle අදියරේදී neck blast දිස්වන්නට පටන් ගත් විට copper hydroxide වෙත මාරු වන්න.
body_translated.ta: நெல் பிளாஸ்ட் உலகளாவிய நெற்பயிரின் மிக அதிக தாக்கம் கொண்ட நோய்; IRRI உலகளாவிய உற்பத்தி இழப்புகளில் ~30% இதுவே காரணம் எனக் கணிக்கிறது. ஒருங்கிணைந்த நிர்வாகம் நான்கு அடுக்குகளை இணைக்கிறது. (1) ஹோஸ்ட் எதிர்ப்பு மிக நடைமுறை மற்றும் செலவு-திறமையான கட்டுப்பாடு; 100-க்கும் மேற்பட்ட R-ஜீன்கள் தெரியும், ஆனால் ஒற்றை-ஜீன் வகைகள் கடுமையான இனங்களின் கீழ் சரிவடைகின்றன, எனவே பருவங்களுக்கு இடையே எதிர்ப்பு ஆதாரங்களை சுழற்ற வேண்டும். (2) பூஞ்சைக்கொல்லி சுழற்சி: ICAR-சரிபார்க்கப்பட்ட வயல் பாதுகாப்பு தெளிப்புத் தொகுப்பு Prochloraz 23.5% + Tricyclazole 20% SE 2 ml/L (65% நோய் குறைப்பு, 6,026 kg/ha தானியம்) அல்லது Tricyclazole 75% WP 0.6 g/L (52% குறைப்பு); copper oxychloride 0.25% அல்லது copper hydroxide 0.25% இரண்டாவது வரிசை. (3) உயிர்-கட்டுப்பாடு: Pseudomonas fluorescens அளவிடக்கூடிய நோய் குறைப்பு மற்றும் மகசூல் அதிகரிப்பை தருகிறது. (4) தாவரியல்: 3% பூண்டு-குமிழ் சாறு மற்றும் 3% வேப்ப எண்ணெய் சிறந்த இயற்கை தெளிப்புகள். இலங்கை ஏரி-உணவளிக்கப்பட்ட வயல்களுக்கான நடைமுறை விதி: எதிர்ப்பு கொண்ட வகையை (RRDI பரிந்துரைக்கப்பட்ட பட்டியலில் இருந்து) boot நிலையில் Tricyclazole தெளிப்புடன் இணைக்கவும், panicle-நிலையில் neck blast தோன்றத் தொடங்கினால் copper hydroxide-க்கு மாறவும்.

quote: Prochloraz 23.5% + tricyclazole 20% SE @ 2 ml/l was found effective with 64.78% reduction of the disease and highest grain yield of 6026 kg ha-1. Tricyclazole 75% wp @ 0.6 g/l managed the disease with 52.35% reduction. Among the biocontrol agents Pseudomonas fluorescens showed maximum disease reduction. Garlic bulb extract and neem oil @ 3% were found effective.

field_provenance.caveat: IRRI + ICAR pooled evidence. Sri Lankan DOA has its own 2019 pesticide recommendation — agronomist must cross-check these dosages against the Sri Lankan register before they drive a farmer-facing spray recommendation.
